headline: Samsara Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, FY27 Outlook Raised
summary: IOT tops Q1 earnings and revenue estimates as ARR climbed 30%, but investors weigh margin trends and its fiscal 2027 outlook.

headline: Rubrik Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Shares Down
summary: RBRK tops Q1 estimates as subscription ARR hits a record $1.57B, powered by 39% revenue growth and expanding margins amid its cloud shift.

raw.headline: Rubrik Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Shares Down
